description:
The quiz evaluates knowledge of AI system context management, testing skills in handling context windows, token budgets, retrieval methods, prompt structuring, and diagnosing failure modes. It ranges from beginner-friendly to advanced, reflecting a progressive difficulty that challenges both novices and seasoned practitioners. The tone is instructional yet practical, guiding learners toward deeper understanding of production-level AI concerns.
Topics: Context windows, Token budgets, Retrieval strategies, Prompt structure, Failure modes in AI products, Prompt caching, Hybrid search
Audience: Developers and engineers building or scaling production AI systems, as well as hobbyists and students seeking to deepen their expertise in LLM context management.
